item.title: 0.1 Beta 13
item.description:
Habitat Version 0.1 Beta 13

What's New & Improved

  • Improved: Biscuits page layout.
  • Improved: Updated trackpad gestures to follow a different.
  • Added: Language localization support (Kind of). Still needs work for proper translation in some some languages.
  • Added: Beans! New shadow section inside biscuits for those who prefer a dimmed background behind a focused app.
  • Added: 3x3 grid to trackpad gestures when holding SHIFT and doing a title bar gestures. (still needs some work)
  • Fixed: Scroll and Navigate action for mice with titlebar direction.
  • Fixed: Double click action not getting recognized in mouse settings input.

More to come.
— Thank you for all the support & feedback!
